title: 有馬記念の後に・始まるんだ！

text_block_list.name: Creek and Inari
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O and Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Oguri and Yaeno
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Who will pull ahead and claim victory in this
dream race?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: (I'm so, so happy!)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: (I can't believe I have so many amazing rivals!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What a race. She really did show us a dream, huh,
City?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: She sure did.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo and City
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I have one more race in me after all.
Heh, I think I got one more race in me after all.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Now that...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Was the most passionate race EVERRRR!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm so, so, sooo fired up right now! I want more!
I'm shooting for even greater heights! I'm
shooting for a race even better than today!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's what I gotta do if we're all going to have
another race like today!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That's right! I'm just getting STARTED!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh! Look at her! She's so happy, you'd never
guess she lost! But that's Bamboo for ya!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's that energy and enthusiasm of hers that
inspires me to take a page out of her book and
do my best too!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I must admit, I get a bit more fired up seeing
Bamboo like this. Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Let's race together again, for I'm not done either.
I have every intention to shine even brighter on
the track than I did today.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...All I want is another race like this one.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
As do I. And it's not small wonder she makes us
feel this way.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Her fiery spirit has laid open the path and
beckoned us follow. She is the Dream Blazer,
Bamboo Memory.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Burn Bright, Bamboo Memory!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Forever and ever on!
